summary: Completed frontend testing of Real-time Toast system implementation. All core components are properly integrated and functional.

integration_issues.issue: Demo login sessions don't persist when navigating directly to dashboard URLs
Tester role needs proper role assignment - currently redirects to developer dashboard

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with new design
Client auth page has readable dark inputs (white text on dark background)
Builder auth page has readable dark inputs (white text on dark background)
Demo login works and redirects to appropriate dashboards
Developer dashboard shows workspace with ExecutorRealtimeBridge active
Admin Control Center loads with AdminRealtimeBridge
Toast container found in DOM structure
All RealtimeBridge components connected to respective layouts
Navigation from landing to auth pages works
Slide-in-right animation added to Tailwind config
